customAttributes.description:
Secret Lair x God of War: Greek

At the beginning of each player's upkeep, this enchantment deals 2 damage to that player.
If a player would gain life, that player gains no life instead.

When purchasing this unique product, please keep in mind that this card only appears in Secret Lair x The God of War: Greek and will ship out to you after the seller receives the product directly from Wizards of the Coast.The estimated time frame for sellers to receive stock is not fixed, so it could be anywhere between 1 - 10 weeks for delivery.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 11/13/2025 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
customAttributes.flavorText: As the life drained out of Kratos, the arms of Hades reached out to claim their prize.
